agent.name: Quotes Agent (Imported)
agent.description: Graph import that recreates the quotes_agent orchestration flow with phase routing, pre-data collection, data confirmation, quote processing, addons, and fallback.

python_inline.code:
def run(state):
    s = dict(state or {})
    phase = s.get("current_phase", "pre_data_collection")
    route_map = {
        "pre_data_collection": "pre_data_collection_node",
        "initiation": "data_collection_agent",
        "data_collection": "data_collection_agent",
        "data_confirmation": "data_confirmation_node",
        "quote_processing": "quotes_processing_agent",
        "addons": "addons_node",
        "completed": "final_message_processing_node",
        "error": "fallback_node",
    }
    s["__route"] = route_map.get(phase, "fallback_node")
    return s

import re

def run(state):
    s = dict(state or {})
    s.setdefault("collected_data", {})
    s.setdefault("messages", [])
    s.setdefault("is_vertical_asked", False)
    s.setdefault("is_asked_about_dp", False)

    def _content(msg):
        if isinstance(msg, dict):
            return str(msg.get("content", ""))
        return str(getattr(msg, "content", msg))

    last_user = ""
    for m in reversed(s["messages"]):
        txt = _content(m).strip()
        if txt:
            last_user = txt
            break

    text = last_user.lower()
    collected = dict(s.get("collected_data") or {})

    vertical_aliases = {
        "FW": ["fw", "four wheeler", "car", "private car"],
        "GCV": ["gcv", "goods carrying", "truck"],
        "MISCD": ["miscd", "misc", "miscellaneous"],
        "PCV": ["pcv", "passenger carrying", "bus", "taxi"],
    }

    def detect_vertical(t):
        for key, aliases in vertical_aliases.items():
            if any(a in t for a in aliases):
                return key
        return None

    vertical = collected.get("vertical")
    if not vertical:
        found_vertical = detect_vertical(text) if s.get("is_vertical_asked") else None
        if found_vertical:
            collected["vertical"] = found_vertical
            s["collected_data"] = collected
        else:
            s["next_field_to_ask"] = {
                "field_name": "vertical",
                "field_type": "enum",
                "required": True,
                "options": [{"value": k, "enum": v[0].upper()} for k, v in vertical_aliases.items()],
                "prompt": "Please select insurance vertical: FW, GCV, MISCD, or PCV.",
            }
            s["is_vertical_asked"] = True
            s["current_phase"] = "pre_data_collection"
            s["__route"] = "final_message_processing_node"
            return s

    dp_details = (s.get("collected_data") or {}).get("dp_details")
    if not dp_details:
        if not s.get("is_asked_about_dp"):
            s["next_field_to_ask"] = {
                "field_name": "dp_name_or_dp_no",
                "field_type": "string",
                "required": True,
                "prompt": "Please provide DP Name or DP Number.",
            }
            s["is_asked_about_dp"] = True
            s["current_phase"] = "pre_data_collection"
            s["__route"] = "final_message_processing_node"
            return s

        dp_no_match = re.search(r"(?:dp\s*[-_ ]?no|dp\s*number|dp)\s*[:#-]?\s*([a-z0-9-]{3,})", text)
        dp_name_match = re.search(r"(?:dp\s*name)\s*[:=-]\s*([a-z0-9 ._-]{3,})", text)

        if dp_no_match or dp_name_match:
            dp_no = dp_no_match.group(1).upper() if dp_no_match else "UNKNOWN"
            dp_name = dp_name_match.group(1).strip().title() if dp_name_match else f"DP {dp_no}"
            collected = dict(s.get("collected_data") or {})
            collected["dp_details"] = {
                "dp_partner_id": f"DP-{dp_no}",
                "dp_no": dp_no,
                "dp_name": dp_name,
            }
            s["collected_data"] = collected
            s["next_field_to_ask"] = None
            s["current_phase"] = "initiation"
            s["__route"] = "data_collection_agent"
            return s

        s["next_field_to_ask"] = {
            "field_name": "dp_name_or_dp_no",
            "field_type": "string",
            "required": True,
            "prompt": "I could not find DP details from your message. Please share DP Name or DP Number in clear format.",
        }
        s["__route"] = "final_message_processing_node"
        return s

    s["current_phase"] = "initiation"
    s["next_field_to_ask"] = None
    s["__route"] = "data_collection_agent"
    return s

import uuid
from datetime import datetime

def run(state):
    s = dict(state or {})
    s.setdefault("collected_data", {})
    s.setdefault("trigger_fallback", False)

    if s.get("trigger_fallback"):
        s["__route"] = "fallback_node"
        return s

    try:
        if not s.get("is_upload_doc_done"):
            uid = uuid.uuid4().hex[:10].upper()
            thread_id = str(s.get("thread_id") or s.get("session_id") or "")
            s["upload_doc_response"] = {
                "isComplete": True,
                "threadId": thread_id,
                "requestId": f"REQ-{uid}",
                "turtleDocCaseId": f"CASE-{uid}",
                "ticketId": f"TKT-{uid}",
            }
            s["is_upload_doc_done"] = True

        required = ["full_name", "mobile_number", "vehicle_number", "policy_expiry_date"]
        missing = [k for k in required if not (s.get("collected_data") or {}).get(k)]

        if missing:
            field = missing[0]
            s["process_qis_response"] = {
                "resultType": "QUOTES_REQUEST",
                "newly_extracted_fields": {},
                "validation_errors": {field: "Required field missing"},
            }
            s["next_field_to_ask"] = {
                "field_name": field,
                "field_type": "string",
                "required": True,
                "prompt": f"Please provide {field.replace('_', ' ')} to continue quote processing.",
            }
            s["quote_created"] = False
            s["current_phase"] = "data_collection"
            s["__route"] = "final_message_processing_node"
            return s

        s["process_qis_response"] = {
            "resultType": "AUTOMATED",
            "newly_extracted_fields": {},
            "validation_errors": {},
            "processed_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
        }
        s["quote_created"] = True
        s["current_phase"] = "addons"
        s["final_message_context"] = "Quote request was processed successfully. Proceeding to addons step."
        s["__route"] = "final_message_processing_node"
        return s

    except Exception as exc:
        s["trigger_fallback"] = True
        s["final_message_context"] = f"Quote processing failed: {exc}"
        s["__route"] = "fallback_node"
        return s

def run(state):
    s = dict(state or {})
    if s.get("trigger_fallback"):
        s["__route"] = "fallback_node"
        return s

    if s.get("quote_created"):
        s["current_phase"] = "completed"
        s["final_message_context"] = (
            "Since addons were not selected during this step, the quote has been created without addons. "
            "You can still add addons later from the quote page."
        )
        s["__route"] = "final_message_processing_node"
        return s

    s["trigger_fallback"] = True
    s["final_message_context"] = "Addons step could not be completed due to missing quote context."
    s["__route"] = "fallback_node"
    return s

def run(state):
    s = dict(state or {})
    s["current_phase"] = s.get("current_phase") or "error"
    s["final_message_context"] = (
        "There seems to be an issue in the automated flow. "
        "Please continue from assisted support or retry with complete details."
    )
    s["trigger_fallback"] = False
    s["__route"] = "final_message_processing_node"
    return s
